song.title: In the Mighty Name of Jesus
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) In the Mighty Name of Jesus, When we bow before the Throne, Many deadly foes are vanquished, Many victories are won.
[C] Chorus Mighty Name! Mighty Name! In that Name alone we win. Mighty Name! Mighty Name! Conqu’ring Satan, death, and sin.
[V2] 2) When we plead the Name of Jesus, Satan and his hosts must flee. Jesus! Jesus! Precious Jesus! In Thy Name is victory.
[V3] 3) Soon shall come the blessed moment When the battle shall be won, When the Mighty Name of Jesus Shall exalt us to the Throne.
song.author: Margaret E. Barber
